summary: Testing of new İlan Ver Akış Ayarları admin card and listing-create config endpoints - All features verified working
context_for_next_testing_agent: İlan Ver Akış Ayarları card is fully functional. listing_create_config is exposed via /api/places/config and editable via admin endpoints.

verified_features.ilan_ver_card_visibility: PASS - 'İlan Ver Akış Ayarları' card visible in Admin System Settings
verified_features.ilan_ver_card_title: PASS - Card title shows 'İlan Ver Akış Ayarları'
verified_features.ilan_ver_modules_section: PASS - Uygulanacak modüller section with Vasıta, Emlak, Diğer checkboxes
verified_features.ilan_ver_toggle_options: PASS - 9 toggle options visible: postal_code_required, map_required, street_selection_required, require_city, require_district, require_neighborhood, require_latitude, require_longitude, require_address_line
verified_features.ilan_ver_save_button: PASS - İlan Ver Ayarlarını Kaydet button functional
verified_features.config_persistence: PASS - Saved config is reflected in both admin GET and places/config
verified_features.google_maps_card_visible: PASS - Google Maps (İlan Adres Akışı) card visible
verified_features.google_maps_key_status: PASS - Shows 'Key Tanımlı' with masked key
verified_features.google_maps_clear_key_button: PASS - Key'i Temizle button visible and clickable
verified_features.postal_lookup_real_mode: PASS - Postal lookup works in real mode with live API key

api_test_results.GET /api/admin/system-settings/listing-c: 200 OK - Returns config object with all expected fields
api_test_results.POST /api/admin/system-settings/listing-: 200 OK - Saves and returns updated config
api_test_results.GET /api/places/config: 200 OK - Returns listing_create_config with saved values
